title: 11 Herbal Teas For Amenorrhea
description: Astragalus membranaceus teas contains saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides as its bioactive constituents. These compounds help to regulate menstrual cycles and promote hormone balance by modulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis. The saponins in Astragalus membranaceus teas have anti-inflammatory properties that may reduce stress and anxiety, which are common causes of amenorrhea. The flavonoids and polysaccharides in the tea have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects ...
